rules.rule: code_iata must be present and unique when airport_type is commercial
origin_airport_slug and destination_airport_slug must reference existing airport slugs
airport_slug must reference an existing airport
terminal_slug should reference an existing terminal when terminal-specific access matters
customer-facing summary fields should be at least 120 characters
featured_image should be present for airports, lounges, airlines, routes, destinations, and aircraft
slug fields must be globally unique within each entity type
internal_notes must never be rendered on public pages
